Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\(''data/db/factorflow.db''\); cursor = conn.cursor\(\); cursor.execute\(''SELECT name, code FROM factors WHERE code LIKE ""%close_open_ratio%""''\); print\(cursor.fetchall\(\)\); conn.close\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\(''data/db/factorflow.db''\); cursor = conn.cursor\(\); cursor.execute\(''UPDATE factors SET code = REPLACE\(code, ""close_open_ratio"", ""\(close / open\)""\) WHERE name = ""Mined_close_open_ratio_1""''\); conn.commit\(\); print\(''Updated''\); cursor.execute\(''SELECT name, code FROM factors WHERE name = ""Mined_close_open_ratio_1""''\); print\(cursor.fetchone\(\)\); conn.close\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\(''data/db/factorflow.db''\); cursor = conn.cursor\(\); cursor.execute\(''SELECT name, code FROM factors WHERE category = ""user_mined"" OR category = ""user_generated""''\); factors = cursor.fetchall\(\); conn.close\(\); print\(''User factors:''\); [print\(f''{f[0]}: {f[1]}''\) for f in factors[:10]]")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\(''data/db/factorflow.db''\); cursor = conn.cursor\(\); cursor.execute\(''SELECT name, code FROM factors WHERE category = ""预置""''\); factors = cursor.fetchall\(\); problem_factors = [f for f in factors if any\(keyword in f[1] for keyword in [''MA_'', ''EMA_'', ''RSI_'', ''close_open'', ''high_low'', ''sma'', ''rsi'']\) and not any\(col in f[1] for col in [''open'', ''high'', ''low'', ''close'', ''volume'']\)]; conn.close\(\); print\(''Potential problem factors:''\); [print\(f''{f[0]}: {f[1]}''\) for f in problem_factors]")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\(''data/db/factorflow.db''\); cursor = conn.cursor\(\); # 查找所有可能包含因子名称引用的用户因子 cursor.execute\(''SELECT name, code FROM factors WHERE category IN \(""user_mined"", ""user_generated""\)''\); factors = cursor.fetchall\(\); print\(''User-generated factors:''\); [print\(f''{f[0]}: {f[1][:80]}...''\) for f in factors]; conn.close\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\(''data/db/factorflow.db''\); cursor = conn.cursor\(\); cursor.execute\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM factors''\); count = cursor.fetchone\(\)[0]; print\(f''Total factors: {count}''\); conn.close\(\)")
